hero.name: Simran Arya
hero.subtitle: Building AI-powered solutions & scalable web applications

about.summary: Aspiring Software Engineer with hands-on experience in Machine Learning and Web Development. Skilled in Python, TensorFlow, and problem-solving. Interested in building scalable and secure applications.

education.institution: VV Arts Commerce & Science Junior College

projects.title: Brain Tumor Detection using CNN
projects.description: Developed a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model to classify brain MRI scans for tumor detection with high accuracy. Implemented image preprocessing, augmentation, and model optimization techniques. Deployed an interactive Streamlit web app for real-time image upload and instant predictions.

projects.title: AI-Powered Vision Assistance System
projects.description: Built an AI-powered Vision Assistance System using Python, OpenCV, and YOLOv8 that detects surrounding objects in real time and provides voice alerts with direction and distance guidance. Supports webcam and phone IP camera integration for smart accessibility and navigation assistance.

projects.title: Shortest Path Visualizer
projects.description: Built an interactive pathfinding visualizer that demonstrates Dijkstra’s Algorithm in real time on a dynamic grid. Users can place walls, set start/end nodes, and watch shortest-path computation step-by-step with animated traversal. Designed responsive UI with optimized state management for smooth rendering and educational learning experience.

activities.description: Actively participated in cybersecurity-focused sessions, workshops, and community initiatives.
Engaged in learning and applying cybersecurity concepts through peer collaboration.
Assisted in organizing the event and served as liaison between speakers and the organizing team.
Organized Startup Bootcamp with 300+ registrations. Led Let's Crack GSOC webinar with 250+ registrations. Contributed to Pixel-AI Hackathon.
